ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform where the game is released */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language supported by the game */,
  "released" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the game */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the game */,
  "total_rating_user" INTEGER /* Total number of users who rated the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publisher who released the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the game */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the game information was last updated */,
  "user_engagement" TEXT /* Metrics such as play time, number of installs, and number of active users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Android, PlayStation 3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the platform is primarily used */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the platform */,
  "active_users" INTEGER /* Number of active users on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the language */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the language is primarily spoken */,
  "user_base" INTEGER /* Number of users who speak the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_platforms" (
  "game_platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-platform relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released on the specific platform */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game on the specific platform */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Link to download the game on the specific platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_platforms_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_languages" (
  "game_language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-language relationship */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "translation_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the translation */,
  "voice_actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voice actor for the language version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_languages_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_languages_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
